benefits.description: Increased arousal, ready for multiple rounds, horny the next day. Natural low sex drive baseline.
Increased flaccid hang and fullness, confidence boost
Tan developed and persisted for at least 2 months after stopping MT2, still darker 4 months out

side_effects.description: Bad nausea at doses over 0.5mg PT-141, but passed
MT2 caused vitiligo to become more noticeable (depigmented areas more prominent against tanned skin). New freckles and moles appeared, old ones darkened.

protocol_notes: PT-141: doses 250-500mcg without refractory period triggered for 2 days; reduced refractory period but not extreme. Sensitivity increased. MT2: 150-250mcg produced similar effects to PT-141 at smaller doses. Experimented with MT2 to see if it would help vitiligo repigmentation—it did not but revealed previously unknown depigmented patches in sun-exposed and non-sun-exposed areas. Vitiligo mostly returned to normal 4 months post-MT2.
